action.query: best chemical peel facial in Katy TX

content.text:
Based on recent web searches for the best chemical peel facials in Katy, TX, I've compiled a list of highly rated options. These recommendations draw from customer reviews, ratings (primarily from Yelp), and clinic descriptions. Keep in mind that "best" is subjective and can depend on your skin type, budget, and specific needs—it's always a good idea to check for the latest reviews, consult with a professional, and possibly book a consultation. Ratings and details are as of my latest data in 2026.

### Top Recommendations
1. **Age Less Skincare** - This spot tops the list with a perfect 5.0 rating from 34 reviews on Yelp. They specialize in customized skincare treatments, including chemical peels for anti-aging and acne. Located in Katy, they're praised for personalized service and effective results[[1]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Chemical+Peel&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX).

2. **Face to Face Spa** - With a 4.9 rating from 35 reviews, this med spa offers over 25 chemical peel options tailored to your skin goals, such as reducing fine lines or improving texture. They have a location in Cinco Ranch (near Katy) and are known for professional, glowing results[[2]](https://facetofacespa.com/cinco-ranch/chemical-peels)[[1]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Chemical+Peel&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX).

3. **Facials by Jada** - Rated 4.8 from 30 reviews, this skincare-focused spot provides chemical peels as part of their facial services, emphasizing smooth, healthy skin resurfacing. Reviewers highlight the relaxing atmosphere and skilled estheticians[[1]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Chemical+Peel&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX).

4. **Clear Dermatology** - A dermatology clinic offering medical-grade chemical peels to treat aging signs and acne by peeling away top skin layers. They're well-regarded for safe, effective treatments in Katy[[3]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/chemical-peels-facials).

5. **Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness** - Specializes in personalized chemical peels for smoother, healthier skin. They're noted for their wellness-oriented approach and positive client feedback[[4]](https://www.hibiscus.health/facial-treatments/chemical-peels).

Other strong contenders include Aviva Dermatology, Anita's Skin Care Clinic, Dr. Kristi Hustak's practice, Allay Med Spa, H-Town Aesthetics, and Viata Aesthetics, all of which offer various chemical peel options with good reputations in the area[[5]](https://www.avivaderm.com/chemical-peel-dermatologist-katy-tx)[[6]](https://anitasskincareclinickaty.com/)[[7]](https://www.kristihustakmd.com/procedures/non-surgical/chemical-peels)[[8]](https://www.allaymedspa.com/vi-chemical-peels-skin-care-katy-tx)[[9]](https://htownaesthetics.com/vi-chemical-peels-in-texas)[[10]](https://www.viataaestheticsandwellness.com/chemical-peels).

For the most up-to-date info, I recommend checking Yelp or Google Reviews directly, as availability and pricing can change. If you have more details (e.g., your skin concerns or budget), I can refine these suggestions!
